bird.name: Perijá thistletail
bird.summary: The Perija thistletail (Asthenes perijana) is an Endangered species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Perijá thistletail
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits páramo grasslands, the upper edge of cloudforest, and dense undergrowth at tree line
